stories.title: Trump rips NATO allies, dashing European hopes for a kumbaya summit
stories.summary: Trump criticized NATO allies at a summit, undermining European expectations for unified alliance relations and policy coordination.

stories.summary: Tennessee National Guard soldiers fatally shot an armed civilian during a patrol pursuit.

stories.summary: Yale researchers obtained GLP-1 prescriptions online with minimal clinician interaction, highlighting regulatory gaps in telehealth oversight.
